---
title: "\'The Cousins and their Friends\'"
---

## \'The Cousins and their Friends\'

**Author:** Anna Maria Keary
**Date:** 1866-1867
**Imprint:** <i>Aunt Judy\'s Magazine</i> (May 1866-December 1867)

### Notes

Published as by the author of <i>Sidney Grey</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
